  • TODO :: Tokenize range into runes

Imports

base_errors, hdebug_misc, halgorithm, oswrap, rx

Types

LineCol = tuple[line: int, column: int]
PosStr = object
  case isSlice*: bool
  of false:
      str*: string
      stream*: Stream

  of true:
      sliceIdx*: int
      baseStr*: ptr string
      slices*: seq[PosStrSlice]

  pos*: int
  line*: int
  column*: int
  ranges*: seq[int]
  bufferActive*: bool
  sliceBuffer*: seq[seq[PosStrSlice]]

HLexerError = ref object of CatchableError
  pos*, line*, column*: int

Consts

LowerAsciiLetters = {'a'..'b'}
HighAsciiLetters = {'A'..'Z'}
IntegerStartChars = {'0'..'9', '-', '+'}
HexDigitsLow = {'0'..'9', 'a'..'f'}
HexDigitsHigh = {'0'..'9', 'A'..'F'}
HexDigits = {'0'..'9', 'A'..'F', 'a'..'f'}
PunctOpenChars = {'(', '[', '{', '<'}
PunctCloseChars = {')', ']', '}', '>'}
PunctSentenceChars = {',', '.', '?', '!', ';', ':'}
PunctChars = {'!', '('..')', ',', '.', ':'..'<', '>'..'?', '[', ']', '{', '}'}
Newline = {'\n'}
AllSpace = {' ', '\t', '\v', '\c', '\n', '\f'}
HorizontalSpace = {'\t', '\v'..'\c', ' '}
VeritcalSpace = {'\n'}

Procs

proc initPosStr(file: AbsFile): PosStr {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc hasNxt(input: PosStr; idx: int): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc finished(str: PosStr): bool {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [].}
proc `?`(str: PosStr): bool {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [].}
proc fillNext(str; chars: int) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                 tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
Read necessary amount of data from stream to make at least chars lookahead available 
proc resetBuffer(str) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Reset buffer position 
proc `[]`(str; idx: int = 0): char {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc `[]`(str; slice: HSlice[int, BackwardsIndex]): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc `[]`(str; slice: HSlice[int, int]): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc `[]`(str; offset: int; patt: char | set[char] | string): bool {...}{.inline.}
proc `[]`(str; patt: char | set[char] | string): bool {...}{.inline.}
proc `[]`(str; patt1, patt2: char | set[char] | string): bool {...}{.inline.}
proc `[]`(str; patt1, patt2, patt3: char | set[char] | string): bool {...}{.inline.}
proc `@`(str): seq[char] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc `[]`(str; slice: HSlice[int, char]): string {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc `$`(slice: PosStrSlice): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc `[]`(str; slice: PosStrSlice): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc lineAround(str; pos: int): tuple[line: string, pos: int] {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc `$`(str): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc pushRange(str) {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
proc startSlice(str) {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
proc finishSlice(str) {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toggleBuffer(str; activate: bool = not str.bufferActive) {...}{.inline,
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc popRange(str; leftShift: int = 0; rightShift: int = 0): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc advance(str; step: int = 1) {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skip(str; ch: char) {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError,
    ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipWhile(str; chars: set[char]) {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipUntil(str; chars: set[char]; including: bool = false) {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipToEOL(str; including: bool = true) {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipIndent(str; maxIndent = high(int)): int {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipSpace(str) {...}{.inline,
                      raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError],
                      tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc space(str) {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError],
                  tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popWhile(str; chars: set[char]): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popUntil(str; chars: set[char] | char): string {...}{.inline.}
proc startsWith(str; skip: set[char]; search: string): bool {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc getIndent(str): int {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError],
                           tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc hasIndent(str; indent: int; exactIndent: bool = false): bool {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc peekStr(str; chars: int): string {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc pop(str: var PosStr): char {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popChar(str: var PosStr): char {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popStringLit(str: var PosStr): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popDigit(str: var PosStr): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popIdent(str; chars: set[char] = IdentChars): string {...}{.inline,
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popNext(str; count: int): string {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc popBacktickIdent(str): string {...}{.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc readLine(str; skipNl: bool = true): string {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipLine(str) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError],
                     tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc matchLen(inStr: PosStr; regex: Regex): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc matchLen(inStr: PosStr; regex: Regex; matches: var openArray[string]): int {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc cut(str; rx: Rx | Regex; fill: int = 128): string

Funcs

func lineCol(str: PosStr): LineCol {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func len(slice: PosStrSlice): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func toAbsolute(slice: PosStrSlice; offset: int): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func initPosStr(str: string): PosStr {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Create new string with full buffer and nil input stream 
func initPosStr(stream: Stream): PosStr {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Create new string with empty buffer and non-nil input stream. 
func initPosStr(str): PosStr {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Pop one layer of slices from slice buffer and create new sub-string lexer from it. 
func initPosStrView(str): PosStr {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Create substring with 0 .. high(int) slice range 
func contains(slice: PosStrSlice; position: int): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

Macros

macro scanpTemp(str: typed; pattern: varargs[untyped]): untyped

Templates

template raiseUnexpectedChar(str: PosStr)
template raiseCannotGetOffset(str: PosStr; offset: int)
template atom(input: PosStr; idx: int; c: char): bool
template atom(input: PosStr; idx: int; s: set[char]): bool
template nxt(input: var PosStr; idx, step: int = 1)
template assertAhead(str: PosStr; ahead: string)
template `=~`(inStr: var PosStr; regex: Regex; advance: int = 128): untyped
template `=~`(inStr: PosStr; regex: Regex): untyped
template `=~`(inStr: PosStr; regex: Rx): untyped
